requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 under QS Standards (240 V / 50 Hz / Type G)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — QS标准下的IEC 62368-1（240 V / 50 Hz / G型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — QS標準下的IEC 62368-1（240 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭）

summary.en: Qatar operates at 240 V / 50 Hz and uses the British BS 1363 Type G three-pin square plug as the standard mains socket. Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices (including AC power adapters and chargers supplied with the product) must comply with IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video and IT equipment safety) as harmonised under Qatar QS standards. Test reports from a QSMO- or CRA-accepted accredited laboratory to IEC 62368-1 at 240 V / 50 Hz are required; Chinese GB 4943.1 (based on IEC 60950-1) test reports are not accepted as direct equivalents. Products must be supplied with Type G plugs or an appropriate adapter; Chinese Type I or Type A plugs are not compatible with Qatar mains outlets without adaptation. Labelling must indicate rated voltage and frequency in Arabic and English.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔电网电压为240 V/50 Hz，标准市电插座使用英式BS 1363 G型三脚方形插头。有市电供电的无线及物联网设备（包括随产品附带的交流电源适配器和充电器）须符合按卡塔尔QS标准协调的IEC 62368-1（音视频及IT设备安全）。须提交经QSMO或CRA认可的认可实验室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1测试报告；中国GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）测试报告不被接受为直接等效。产品须配备G型插头或适当的转接头；中国I型或A型插头与卡塔尔市电插座不兼容，无需适配。标签须以阿拉伯文和英文标注额定电压和频率。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾電網電壓為240 V/50 Hz，標準市電插座使用英式BS 1363 G型三腳方形插頭。有市電供電的無線及物聯網設備（包括隨產品附帶的交流電源適配器和充電器）須符合按卡塔爾QS標準協調的IEC 62368-1（音視頻及IT設備安全）。須提交經QSMO或CRA認可的認可實驗室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1測試報告；中國GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）測試報告不被接受為直接等效。產品須配備G型插頭或適當的轉接頭；中國I型或A型插頭與卡塔爾市電插座不相容，無需適配。標籤須以阿拉伯文和英文標注額定電壓和頻率。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 Ed.3 (AV and IT equipment safety, adopted as QS standard)
BS 1363 / BS 546 Type G plug (240 V / 50 Hz Qatar mains standard)
Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications (MOTC / CRA authority)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for ICT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 60950-1, the predecessor to IEC 62368-1) under CCC (China Compulsory Certification). Chinese mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz; Chinese sockets use Type I (two flat pins angled) or Type A (two flat parallel pins) plugs. CCC test reports to GB 4943.1 are issued by CNAS-accredited CCC designated laboratories.
summary.zh: 在中国，ICT及AV设备的电气安全受CCC（中国强制认证）下的GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1对标，为IEC 62368-1的前身）约束。中国市电供应为220 V/50 Hz；中国插座使用I型（两个斜角扁平插脚）或A型（两个平行扁平插脚）插头。CCC GB 4943.1测试报告由CNAS认可的CCC指定实验室出具。
summary.zht: 在中國，ICT及AV設備的電氣安全受CCC（中國強制認證）下的GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1對標，為IEC 62368-1的前身）約束。中國市電供應為220 V/50 Hz；中國插座使用I型（兩個斜角扁平插腳）或A型（兩個平行扁平插腳）插頭。CCC GB 4943.1測試報告由CNAS認可的CCC指定實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (ICT equipment safety, aligned with IEC 60950-1)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (electrical safety and EMC)
GB 2099 (plug and socket standards, Type I / Type A)

gap.en: Three distinct gaps exist: (1) Standard mismatch — Qatar requires IEC 62368-1; China CCC tests to GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 based). Fresh test reports to IEC 62368-1 at 240 V / 50 Hz from a QSMO/CRA-accepted laboratory are required. (2) Mains voltage — Qatar is 240 V / 50 Hz vs. China 220 V / 50 Hz; products must be tested and rated for 240 V operation. (3) Plug type — Qatar standard is BS 1363 Type G (three-pin square); Chinese product shipments use Type I or Type A plugs which are incompatible and must be changed or adapted for Qatar sale.
gap.zh: 存在三个明显差距：(1) 标准不匹配——卡塔尔要求IEC 62368-1；中国CCC依据GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）测试。须提交经QSMO/CRA认可实验室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1全新测试报告。(2) 市电电压——卡塔尔为240 V/50 Hz，中国为220 V/50 Hz；产品须经240 V运行测试和额定。(3) 插头类型——卡塔尔标准为BS 1363 G型（三脚方形）；中国产品出货使用I型或A型插头，与卡塔尔插座不兼容，须为卡塔尔销售更换或适配。
gap.zht: 存在三個明顯差距：(1) 標準不匹配——卡塔爾要求IEC 62368-1；中國CCC依據GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）測試。須提交經QSMO/CRA認可實驗室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1全新測試報告。(2) 市電電壓——卡塔爾為240 V/50 Hz，中國為220 V/50 Hz；產品須經240 V運行測試和額定。(3) 插頭類型——卡塔爾標準為BS 1363 G型（三腳方形）；中國產品出貨使用I型或A型插頭，與卡塔爾插座不相容，須為卡塔爾銷售更換或適配。

source.publisher: QSMO — Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mains-powered wireless devices for Qatar require IEC 62368-1 test reports at 240 V / 50 Hz from a QSMO/CRA-accepted laboratory. Chinese CCC (GB 4943.1 / IEC 60950-1) test reports are not directly accepted. Devices must be fitted with BS 1363 Type G plugs and rated for 240 V. Arabic and English voltage/frequency labelling is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向卡塔尔市场的有市电供电无线设备须提供QSMO/CRA认可实验室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1测试报告。中国CCC（GB 4943.1/IEC 60950-1）测试报告不被直接接受。设备须配备BS 1363 G型插头并额定为240 V。须以阿拉伯文和英文标注电压/频率。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向卡塔爾市場的有市電供電無線裝置須提供QSMO/CRA認可實驗室在240 V/50 Hz下出具的IEC 62368-1測試報告。中國CCC（GB 4943.1/IEC 60950-1）測試報告不被直接接受。裝置須配備BS 1363 G型插頭並額定為240 V。須以阿拉伯文和英文標注電壓/頻率。
